urdu transliteration text:
HUI HAI KHALQ YE DUNIYA, HUSSAIN KI KHATIR
Hussain Ki Khatir
english translation text: This world has been created, O Hussain, just for your sake

urdu transliteration text: IMAM-E-ASR HAI ZINDAA HUSSAIN KI KHATIR
english translation text: The Imam of our time is alive,  O Hussain, just for your sake

urdu transliteration text: KAHA WO NOOR SARAPA, KAHA MAKAAN MERA,
english translation text: Where is my status as compared to the epitome of light?

urdu transliteration text: SHARAF YE FARSHE AZA SE MUJHE NASIB HUA,
english translation text: I achieved prestige by organizing majlis of Imam Hussain (A.S)…

urdu transliteration text: MERE GHAR AA GAYI ZEHRA
english translation text: Zahra (A.S) herself came to my house…

urdu transliteration text: HUSSAIN KI KHATIR
english translation text: O Hussain, just for your sake

urdu transliteration text: YAHI DALEEL HAI EK-DUSRE SE ULFAT KI,
english translation text: This is the only proof of love for one another

urdu transliteration text: RIZA E RAB KE LIYE KIJIYE AZADARI
english translation text: Do Azadaari for the pleasure of (obtaining closeness to) God

urdu transliteration text: KHUDA KO KIJIYE SAJDA
english translation text: Prostrate only to God

urdu transliteration text: HUSSAIN KI KHATIR
english translation text: O Hussain, just for your sake

urdu transliteration text: MUBAHILE KA ASAR KARBALA ME DEKH LIYA
english translation text: We saw the effect of Mubahila in Kerbala

urdu transliteration text: WAHAB KI MAA TUJHE POHNCHE SALAAM QAIM (A.T.F.S.) KA,
english translation text: O Wahab’s mother, salutations to you from Imam Mahdi (A.S)

urdu transliteration text: KHUDA KO DE DIYA BETA
english translation text: You gave away your son in the name of God

urdu transliteration text: HUSSAIN KI KHATIR
english translation text: O Hussain, just for your sake

urdu transliteration text: SILA HUSSAIN KI MAADAR SE USKO AISA MILA,
english translation text: They received such a reward from Hussain’s (A.S) mother…

urdu transliteration text: HAR EK SHAHEED YE MARKAD ME KAR RAHA HAI DUA,
english translation text: Every martyr is supplicating from his grave…

urdu transliteration text: KE MAUT AAE DOBARA
english translation text: That they are given death again…

urdu transliteration text: HUSSAIN KI KHATIR
english translation text: O Hussain, just for your sake

urdu transliteration text: SAWAAL POOCHEGA JAB KOI PUCHNE WALA
english translation text: When a questioner asks you…

urdu transliteration text: LIBAAS PEHNA TUNE YE KIS LIYE KALA
english translation text: “Why have you worn black clothes?”

urdu transliteration text: KAHEGA KHANA E KABA HUSSAIN KI KHATIR
english translation text: The Holy Kabaah will respond “O Hussain, just for your sake”
